name: aspice_swe3
purpose: Generate a detailed design document for a Simulink model using the sdd-detail-design-generation skill.
instructions: Use model_overview on the root model to understand the hierarchy.
Use model_read on the root model and on every subsystem that will receive a chapter in the document.
Use model_query_params and model_resolve_params to capture block parameters, sample times, and workspace values when they appear in the model.
Keep the existing DdGeneration.m script unchanged and treat it as the legacy report path.
Derive each subsystem chapter description from the actual signal flow, internal blocks, and parameter usage.
Include input interfaces, output interfaces, calibration parameters, subsystem screenshots, and hyperlink navigation in the final report.
Do not invent behavior that is not visible in the model or workbook.
